_comment: Copy this to <your-project>/.claude/review-gate.json and edit. The plugin ships with the gate OFF: with no such file, the review-gate hook does nothing. See the README 'Review gate' section for the full schema.
_comment_mode: warn = surface a message and proceed (default, least-surprise). ask = require a confirmation before the merge/push runs (recommended for money-critical scope). block = deny until a fresh review exists or REVIEW_GATE_BYPASS=1 is set. Every fire and every bypass is written to log_path. (mode applies to the merge/push gate only — the stop_nudge is always a soft surface.)
_comment_triggers: Which events arm the gate. merge_push (default true) = the PreToolUse gate on a git merge/push to master. stop_nudge (default false) = a soft, debounced reminder at turn-end when HEAD carries committed-but-unreviewed must_review code. Both share the must_review scope. Add .claude/review-gate-state.json and the log to .gitignore.
_comment_must_review: Repo-root-relative globs. The gate only acts when a merge/push to master changes one of these. Empty list = silent. Example below is the chief-of-staff money code that reached master unreviewed on 29-30 May.
